description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, testall, testldap, and testldapmemcache. In the build stage add a build job that uses the debian:unstable image, runs `apt-get -y update`, creates man directories with `bash -c 'mkdir -p /usr/share/man/man{0..10}'`, installs build-essential devscripts fakeroot dh-exec jdupes doxygen graphviz php-cli phpunit rst2pdf, moves `debian/changelog` to `debian/changelog.old`, generates a new changelog by concatenating version, date, git short SHA and author info via a complex `cat <(echo ...)` command, removes the old file, downloads the awl source archive with `curl ... | tar zxf -`, moves it to `/usr/share/awl/`, builds the Debian package with `debuild -us -uc -b -d`, moves the resulting `../davical_*_all.deb` to `davical.deb`, and stores all `*.deb` files as artifacts. In the testall stage add a build_bullseye_latestphp job that uses the php:apache-bullseye image and repeats the same steps as build, but also downloads phpunit with `curl -o /usr/bin/phpunit -L https://phar.phpunit.de/phpunit-9.phar`, makes it executable, and runs `debuild --prepend-path=/usr/local/bin -us -uc -b -d` before storing the `.deb` artifact. In the test stage add a test job that uses debian:unstable, runs `testing/gitlab_ci_script.sh`, then executes `cd testing && su testrunner -c 'IS_CI=yes ALLSUITES="regression-suite binding carddav scheduling webui ischedule" ./run_regressions.sh all x'`, runs `testing/gitlab_ci_after_script.sh build` after the script, and always uploads `testing/report.xml`, `apache2_log/*`, and `davical_log/*` as a JUnit report artifact. In the testall stage add a test_bullseye_carddavclientinterop job using debian:bullseye that runs `testing/gitlab_ci_script.sh interop`, then `cd testing && su testrunner -c 'IS_CI=yes ./run_regressions.sh regression-suite x'`, then runs `cd ../carddavclient-master && vendor/bin/phpunit -c tests/Interop/phpunit.xml --no-coverage`, runs `testing/gitlab_ci_after_script.sh` after, and always uploads the same logs plus `carddavclient-master/testreports/unit/results.html` and all `carddavclient-master/testreports/interop/*` as JUnit reports. Also add a test_bullseye_latestphp job using php:apache-bullseye that runs `testing/gitlab_ci_script.sh` and the same regression command as the test job, with the same after_script and artifacts. Add a test_ldap job in the testldap stage using debian:unstable that runs `testing/gitlab_ci_script.sh ldap` and `cd testing && su testrunner -c 'IS_CI=yes ALLSUITES="ldap" ./run_regressions.sh all x'`, with the same after_script and artifacts. Add a test_memcache job in the testall stage using debian:unstable that runs `testing/gitlab_ci_script.sh memcache` and the full regression suites command, with the same after_script and artifacts. Finally, add a test_memcache_and_ldap job in the testldapmemcache stage using debian:unstable that runs `testing/gitlab_ci_script.sh ldap_memcache_auth` and `cd testing && su testrunner -c 'IS_CI=yes ALLSUITES="ldap ldap_memcache" ./run_regressions.sh all x'`, runs `testing/gitlab_ci_after_script.sh` after, and always uploads the logs, `testing/report.xml`, and `davical_conf/*` as JUnit artifacts.
